name: An albino crocodile
description:
“Who lives in a house in the Hackensack, Is that all you get for your money? And it seems such a waste of time…that’s what you’re all about! Mama, if that’s moving up then I’m……moving out!”—Moving out (Anthony’s song)

FINALLY, ANOTHER ONE.

Someone else did make a bot like this, but it was sorta outta date, idk, I just wanted to make my own.

Don’t worry, she’s nice…I think.

artist: Kurenaiz (twitter)

Ok I had this in the freezer for a good minute, decided it might be time to put it on the grill and throw in some spices
creator: Retrotande
